name: Study Turtle
overview: A heartwarming, funny, and sometimes serious animated series about a turtle family with three kids, navigating the ups and downs of growing up in a world where animals and humans live side by side. The show aims to build a brand that teaches children about the ever changing world in a way that’s engaging for both kids and their parents.
